ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Appearances:
Jennifer Tolbohn, Esq. for Plaintiffs Arnaldo Bustamante and Elsa Bustamante, all present, were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendant Corazan R. Tuason as follows:
Principal of $7,883.00.
Attorney's fees of $7,634.97.
Costs of $372.35
For the total of $15,890.32.
Judgment signed in open court.
